examples: Wide eyes: Black eyeliner made from charred egret bones.
I spotted this lone Great Egret in a large area of marsh grass.
This cattle egret just brought in a stick and was staring at me.
The pelicans were there in force, competing for space with seagulls and a giant snowy egret.
And every now and again, there was a squawk and a splash as a heron or egret rushed startled into the night.
